channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Tornadoes pummel communities outside Chicago, tearing up homes and toppling power poles
item.description: At least three tornadoes have battered communities outside Chicago, leveling homes and ripping down trees and power poles.

item.title: Where Trump has lost support with independents, according to AP-NORC polling
Supreme Court nixes Alabama request for nitrogen execution, which lower court ruled unconstitutional
